title: So what are the different blood patterns types
display_title: So what are the different blood patterns types
wikitext:
[]: So what are the different blood patterns/types?             Quote Post by flatulant » Sat Jan 06, 2007 10:52 pm And what do they mean?

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Sat Jan 06, 2007 11:00 pm That's a toughie, as no one really knows. Blue is confirmed angel, that's pretty obvious, but the others, hm. My theory is that the blood pattern thing is kinda like the terror alert colors, and different colors mean possibilities of angeldom or activity.

[]: Re: So what are the different blood patterns/types?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 06, 2007 11:01 pm Blue - Adam's kids (but see Orange); GNR Orange - Leliel's shadow; infected EVA-03; Armisael (cycled pattern between orange and blue) Green - EVA-00 (#14) Sepia - Shinji (#20) Red - EVA-01 (#26') flatulant wrote: And what do they mean?

[]: Re: So what are the different blood patterns/types?             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 06, 2007 11:10 pm Reichu wrote: Orange - Leliel's shadow;

[]: Re: So what are the different blood patterns/types?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 06, 2007 11:12 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Now that's gonna cunfuse the hell out of everyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 06, 2007 11:45 pm Omegagouki wrote: 100% confirmed Angel
